attributes.value: Typescript copies of documents omitted from `The Correspondence of Lord William Cavendish Bentinck, Governor-General of India 1828-1835', 2 vols (1977). The typescripts were compiled by Dr B N Pandey as research assistant to the editor of the correspondence, Professor Sir Cyril Philips.
